userStories.title: Create a focused execution plan
userStories.description: Break the target task into small, dependency-aware stories with deterministic tests.
acceptance_criteria: The public `prd.json` contains small stories with stable IDs.
Each story has objective, acceptance criteria, and suggested tests.

userStories.title: Wire repo-local browser verification
userStories.description: Add a repo-local Playwright smoke command and connect it to Ralph's browser verification flow.
acceptance_criteria: UI stories can be verified through a repo-local browser verification command such as `npm run test:e2e`.
Missing browser verification keeps UI stories blocked instead of silently passing.

userStories.title: Document the local workflow
userStories.description: Explain setup, verification, and review flow clearly enough for another developer to reuse the loop without guessing.
acceptance_criteria: README explains setup, run flow, and browser verification expectations.
An example case study or sample PRD is available for reference.
